_comment: Canonical settings.json template. Rendered by Publish-Agents.ps1 (Job 2) into agents/{AGENT_NAME}/.claude/settings.json and (with MCP_SERVER_PATH adjusted) into root .claude/settings.json. Placeholders: ../../../tools/mcp-server/dist/index.js, d365-fo, (agent standalone). Drift-checked; do NOT hand-edit any generated copy.

hooks._comment: Hard-gate enforcement hooks (bk-022). Stubs only in Phase 4; fully populated when bk-022 is closed. Pre-tool-use hook will read .workflow.json and refuse downstream commands if upstream gates are PENDING. See design/04-workflow-gates.md and design/11-mcp-server.md § Hook configurations.

_meta.do-not-edit: Generated file. Hand-edits fail .github/workflows/check-publish-drift.yml. Author lives at tools/sync/settings.template.json.
